title: Saudi Paella Delight
description: A flavorful and aromatic paella dish inspired by the traditions of Saudi cuisine, featuring saudi arabian spices and buckwheat for a unique twist.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add the Saudi Arabian spice and stir for 1 minute.
Add the buckwheat and stir for 2 minutes.
Add the springy and stir for 2 minutes.
Add the dates and stir for 1 minute.
Add the salt and black pepper and stir for 30 seconds.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
